feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Data Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Data Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Back date entry block
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to block backdated entries based on the user and document period. For example, User 4 should be allowed to make entries up to 3 days before the posting date and should be blocked for another document. Is it possible to implement this requirement?

Kindly provided your best suggestion.

entry.title: How to Implement a Dropdown Menu with Buttons in Object Page Using Fiori Elements and CDS Annotation
entry.content:
I'm looking to enhance the user experience of my Fiori Elements application by adding a dropdown menu with buttons directly within the object page.

How can i achieve this using cds annotations?

Do you have any working example of this implementation that I can have a look at?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: bods job took long time to execute
entry.content:
Hi All,

A bods job taking around 8-9-10 Hrs to complete. Upon checking in trace log, a particular DF taking around 5-6 Hrs to compete successfully, PFA.

This DF contains a SQL tranformation(sql query operation), followed by a query tranformation followed by a key generation and finally the target table. Please let me know where I need to check/fine tune to reduce this job execution time. Let me know anything further information required.

Regards

Siba

entry.title: BODS recurring job failed repeatedly with same error
entry.content:
Hi All

A BODS recurring job failed repeatedly with same error: PFA

Any suggestion regarding this error ?

 

BR

Siba

entry.title: Include in job log the values of datastore configuration and substitution parameters
entry.content: For more detailed job logging, I would like to include the runtime values of my datastore configurations and substitution parameters. Is that metadata exposed and available for including in job logs?

entry.title: bods job failed
entry.content:
Hi All,

A bods recurring job failed with an error, please anyone clarify me this attached error

 

Regards

Siba

entry.title: bods job retriggered twice
entry.content:
Hi All

Suppose a bods job failed, so if we retriggered first time and if it's success, then fine.

Suppose if we retiggered twice , will there be any data duplication occuers?

But I abosrbed as I retriggered a job twice, the row count in monitor log of both retggered jobs showing same(2948883). If data would duplicated then the row count of 2nd retriggered job would have shown double(2948883*2= 5897766) of 1st retiggered row count(2948883) ? Please correct if I am wrong here.

Regards,

Siba

entry.title: SAP BODS - Data exporting in incorrect order (.csv file)
entry.content:
We have an ETL batch job that loads data from a database table into a CSV file. The first column in the CSV file is a key column. Although all the values are exported successfully, the key values are not sorted in the CSV file. 

 

#SAP BODS

#Data Services

SAP Data Services

entry.title: documentation to configure windows AD Single Sign on for SAP Data Services
entry.content:
We're upgranding to DS 4.3 and would like to implement AD SSO for DS Designer.

As we're doing the installation with IPS we need to know what configuration has to be done for this to work.

Is it enough the configure IPS or is it something to be done on Data Services installation side ?

Available to discuss.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Requirements Oracle user for data services repository
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently in the works of creating local / central repositories. I have a few questions about the database user requirements on an Oracle database.

In the installation guide i find the following to setup a database account for a local repository. 

"Ensure that the database accounts have privileges to create, modify, and delete tables, and to create stored procedures."

My question is what privileges does the database account need when the repository is running? (After installation). Are these the same privileges?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Understanding date condition in bods job
entry.content:
Hi All

I have seen a date condition in job transformation as below,

does it mean this condition would fetch data records 21 days prior to current data and 21 days later to current sate ?

Date field >= to_char(sysdate()-21, 'yyyymmdd')

and

Date field <= to_char(sysdate()+21, 'yyyymmdd')

 

Regards

Siba

entry.title: Write to a text file from within script?
entry.content: In my batch job script, I'd like to implement the logging of metadata to a text file on my DS server. The metadata would include date, time, name, substitution parameter values, datastore field values, etc. Obviously, some of this metadata is already available in the DSMC; by logging it to a text file, however, the results would be more specific, more easily searchable, and available for a longer period of time. Is it possible to write to a text file from within script?

entry.title: Manuals SAP PI PO Cloud Integration Data Services
entry.content:
hi,

where can I find manuals to get started on sap PI / PO, sap cloud integration and sap data services?


I would need manuals such as which explains what it is: Enterprise Services Repository


Thank you

entry.title: Information about SAP BODS and Salesforce API Compatibility
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently working on a project for a client who uses ETL SAP Business Object Data Services 4.2 SP14. In this version, we are attempting to import data from Salesforce using the standard Salesforce.com adapter. However, we have discovered that this adapter only supports Salesforce APIs up to version 21.0.

I would like to inquire if upgrading to the latest version, SAP BODS 4.3 SP0, would enable us to use APIs beyond version 30.0. This is crucial for us as the older API versions will be deprecated in Salesforce's '25 release, and they do not allow us to import certain Salesforce objects and fields essential for our project.

Thank you for your assistance. Please let me know if you need any further information.

Best regards,
Edoardo

#SAP BODS 4.2 SP14 #SAP BODS 4.3 SP0

entry.title: SAP Data Services: Behavior confirmation for SQL query submitted for reader in 4.2 vs 4.3
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are in the upgrade process of SAP Data Services from version 4.2 to version 4.3.
We are observing a behavior change in the way SQL query is submitted for the reader in v4.3 and v4.2.

We have a job that will fetch data from 3 tables. When we checked the Query Transform object then we found that one of the tables is neither used in the select clause nor in the where clause.

For ex:
Let us assume we have 3 tables namely A, B and, C. In the data flow, the C table is neither used in the select clause nor the where clause. 

We ran the ETL on v4.2 and v4.3 and below is the observation from the logs:

  1. V4.2 logs: SQL query for the table that is not used is not submitted for the reader
  2. V4.3 logs: SQL query for the table that is not used is submitted for the reader

Question:
Is this an expected behavior of SAP Data Services for the respective version?

Note:
We understand that if the table is not used in the data flow then we should remove it but before doing that we want to understand this is the expected behavior or not.

entry.title: How to change Data service password after the password of default CMS,LCM,Audit database are changed
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How to change passwords on SAP Data service (BODS) server after the user passwords of default CMS ,LCM and Audit database are changed . Kindly suggest .


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Run a job with BODS Designer 4.2 SP14
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

On BODS 4.2 SP14 Designer I have a problem when I want to run a job.
- If there is no job running on the repository, you can launch a job
- If a job is already running (launched by me or another person), I get the message "the job server you selected is not working" as well as BODI-1241023 when I go to the designer's job server icon.
But in all cases I can run a job via the console.

I couldn't find any relevant information in the log files.

Can anyone help me?

Regards
Laurent

entry.content:

How to migrate our SAP Data Services tasks/jobs to another server machine?

entry.title: Is Amazon RDS database supported SAP Data Services 4.3 SP2 as repository or source/target DB?
entry.content:
Hi,
We are migrating to AWS Cloud and would like to use Amazon RDS for Data Stores and SAP Data Services Repository, CMS Repository and Audit Repository. Is there option for support some database from RDS portfolio or is there plan for supporting of any Database from portfolio


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
